scripts.bootstrap: bun install && cd frontend && bun run sdk && cd ..
scripts.lint: cd backend && bun run lint && cd ../frontend && bun run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd backend && bun run lint:fix && cd ../frontend && bun run lint:fix
scripts.lint:unsafefix: cd backend && bun run lint:unsafefix && cd ../frontend && bun run lint:unsafefix
